purpose: Wire /add to render the blended first-visit welcome screen (contact variant) for a genuine first-time visitor who opens a contact-card link, instead of today's silent 'setting up...' spinner. Decodes the inviter's name read-only for display, gates the primary action on a non-blank name, and on submit saves the name locally then runs the existing add-contact flow (including the existing pending-pairing-echo mechanism) unchanged except for name-capture ordering.

public_api.name: deriveInviterName
public_api.description: Pure. Composes the existing parseContactCard seam (app/src/lib/contactCard.ts) -- introduces no decode/signature-verification logic of its own. Returns the verified, readable inviter nickname, or null for any of: a v1 card with no name, a bare npub, a nostr: URI, or a decode/verification error. Exported from app/src/lib/contactInviteLine.ts for unit coverage (AC-CONTACT-2/3).

private_files: app/pages/add.tsx (default-exported page component; no other module imports it)
owned_data: None persisted by this story. add.tsx's own transient React state (cardPayload, welcomeConfirmed, welcomeNameValue) is render-local, not storage.
dependencies_allowed: app/src/context/NostrIdentityContext.tsx (useNostrIdentity -- hydrated, isFreshIdentity [S1 seam], pubkeyHex, privateKeyHex)
app/src/lib/addDeepLink.ts (readLocationHash, extractCardPayloadFromHash, resolveAddDeepLink -- all pre-existing, addDeepLink.ts is in-module)
app/src/lib/contactCard.ts (parseContactCard, consumed only via the new contactInviteLine.ts wrapper -- reused as-is per scope.excludes)
app/src/lib/pairing/pendingIntent.ts (attemptOrQueuePairingEcho, PendingIntentSendContext -- pre-existing, unchanged; only call-site ordering changes)

app/src/lib/shareCard.ts (hasShareableName -- pre-existing cross-epic single-source-of-truth predicate for 'has a shareable name', already the convention used by JoinRequestCard.tsx and profile.tsx for the identical name-gate concern; reused, not duplicated, per VQ-S3-011)
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/lib/processContactInput.ts -- never imported directly; add.tsx reaches it only through resolveAddDeepLink's existing single-parse discipline (VQ-S3-002)
Any relay/NDK/broadcast call for the read-only invite-line decode path (AC-PRIV-2)

app/src/lib/profile broadcast helpers (publishProfileUpdate / fanOutProfileAnnounceOnChange) -- out of scope; only saveProfile (local) is called, never a fan-out to existing contacts/groups (AC-PRIV-1, no new publish path)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/lib/contactInviteLine.test.ts (vitest, no jsdom -- pure function coverage of deriveInviterName)

app/tests/e2e/add-welcome.spec.ts (Playwright, non-relay bucket -- filename carries neither a `groups-` nor `dm-` prefix, so playwright.config.ts's testMatch/testIgnore split routes it into the fast/non-relay run; the add flow itself needs no relay)
